examples: Then the pigeons flew into thick fog, and the famous homing instinct failed.
Many birds have a remarkable homing instinct.
I began to feel I was really homing in on the answer.
Unsurprisingly, many of the organizations focus on equine welfare, particularly Thoroughbred aftercare: rescue, retirement, re-training, re-homing.
All police horses suitable for re-homing go to the International League for the Protection of Horses.
